schemaNote: R5 task 030 (D2-20) — Insights tool smoke matrix. 15 questions = 5 per practice area (CTRNS / IPPAT / BNKF) per integration brief §8. Diversified across the 3 Wave D7 synthetic GUIDs (matter / project / invoice). Mix of forceMode (~10 null = classifier, ~3 explicit playbook, ~2 explicit rag) and expectedPath (~6 playbook, ~7 rag, ~2 decline/empty-results). expectedPath is INFORMATIONAL — tests assert STRUCTURAL conformance only (HTTP 200 + envelope shape + correlationId echoed). Verbatim response content is NEVER asserted (ADR-018).

matrix.subject: matter:da116923-d65a-f111-a825-3833c5d9bcb1
matrix.query: What are the closing conditions in this matter?
matrix.rubricHint: Citations grounded in matter documents; [n] tokens match citations; no fabrication

matrix.subject: matter:da116923-d65a-f111-a825-3833c5d9bcb1
matrix.query: What is the predicted cost of this matter?
matrix.rubricHint: predict-matter-cost@v1 envelope; structuredResult.kind = inference; numeric envelope

matrix.subject: matter:da116923-d65a-f111-a825-3833c5d9bcb1
matrix.query: Who are the parties to this transaction?
matrix.rubricHint: Citation-grounded parties extraction; display-name citations resolve

matrix.subject: project:27845394-8e5f-f111-a825-70a8a59455f4
matrix.query: What's the tail policy obligation here?
matrix.rubricHint: RAG path forced; decline OR empty-results legitimate per FR-04 if matter lacks tail-policy docs

matrix.subject: matter:da116923-d65a-f111-a825-3833c5d9bcb1
matrix.query: Is there a regulatory approval requirement in this matter?

matrix.subject: matter:da116923-d65a-f111-a825-3833c5d9bcb1
matrix.query: What patents are claimed in this matter?
matrix.rubricHint: Citation-grounded patent enumeration; decline legitimate if no IP docs on synthetic matter

matrix.subject: project:27845394-8e5f-f111-a825-70a8a59455f4
matrix.query: What's the priority date for the parent application?
matrix.rubricHint: Specific factual extraction with citation requirement; decline legitimate if absent

matrix.subject: project:27845394-8e5f-f111-a825-70a8a59455f4
matrix.query: Who are the named inventors on this project?
matrix.rubricHint: RAG forced; cited inventor names OR empty-results per FR-04 anti-hallucination

matrix.subject: project:27845394-8e5f-f111-a825-70a8a59455f4
matrix.rubricHint: Subjective synthesis; low-confidence likely (badges per task 028 confidence floor); citations grounded

matrix.subject: project:27845394-8e5f-f111-a825-70a8a59455f4
matrix.query: Are there any pending office actions on this project?
matrix.rubricHint: RAG retrieval; empty-results legitimate if no OA docs on synthetic project

matrix.subject: invoice:05c8ef8d-8e5f-f111-a825-70a8a59455f4
matrix.query: What's the total billed on this invoice?
matrix.rubricHint: Single-value extraction from invoice document; citation-grounded; classifier routes appropriately

matrix.subject: matter:da116923-d65a-f111-a825-3833c5d9bcb1
matrix.query: What's the average matter cost across similar transactions?
matrix.rubricHint: predict-matter-cost@v1 with comparableMatters envelope; structuredResult.envelope non-empty

matrix.subject: matter:da116923-d65a-f111-a825-3833c5d9bcb1
matrix.query: What collateral securitization is documented here?
matrix.rubricHint: Citation-grounded collateral extraction; decline OR empty-results legitimate

matrix.subject: matter:da116923-d65a-f111-a825-3833c5d9bcb1
matrix.query: What's the loan covenant compliance status?
matrix.rubricHint: Status-derivation question; decline legitimate per §4.5 if evidence insufficient

matrix.subject: invoice:05c8ef8d-8e5f-f111-a825-70a8a59455f4
matrix.query: Are there any outstanding fee disputes on this invoice?
matrix.rubricHint: Boolean-style RAG question; empty-results legitimate; no fabricated 'yes' if no docs
